name: get-codex-theme
description: Create, validate, install, switch, and safely restore portable Codex themes.

interface.shortDescription: Create and manage portable Codex themes
interface.longDescription: Create a standards-compliant theme from artwork or a palette, validate its assets and licensing, install it, switch themes, diagnose compatibility, and restore the original Codex appearance.
defaultPrompt: Create a Codex theme from my image.
Install a theme and verify it safely.
